Interface IFeatureClassDescription

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control Feature Class Description.

[Guid("6A68BEBE-8B1B-11D2-A06C-0000F877EBD6")]
public interface IFeatureClassDescription

FeatureType

The esriFeatureType for the instances of this class.
